title: Defense Stocks Hit Records As Trump Warns 'Big Wave' In Iran: 10 Names In Focus
author: Piero Cingari
description: Aerospace and defense stocks surged to record levels as Trump indicated a sustained military campaign against Iran is ahead, with the most intense phase still to come. Defense leadership confirmed the operation will extend beyond initial strikes, driving market expectations for increased demand for advanced weapons systems, air defense, and surveillance technologies.

title: Body Armor Plates Market is Forecasted to Reach US$1225 Million in 2031, Says Stratview Research
author: Stratview Research
description: The global body armor plates market is projected to grow from $962.4 million in 2024 to $1.225 billion by 2031, with a 3.5% CAGR. ICW armor plates, Level IV protection, and ceramic materials are expected to dominate the market, driven by increasing global security threats and defense modernization.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed among top market players with no specific positive or negative indicators

title: Cadre Holdings, Inc. (CDRE) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Cadre Holdings, Inc. (CDRE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -28% and 7.77%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Resideo Technologies (REZI) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Resideo Technologies (REZI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 42.42% and 0.10%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Clear Secure (YOU) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Clear Secure (YOU) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
